CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(OtherPhone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & OtherPhone, IF(LEFT(OtherPhone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(OtherPhone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(OtherPhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(OtherPhone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(OtherPhone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(OtherPhone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(OtherPhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(OtherPhone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(OtherPhone, 10, 4), OtherPhone)), OtherPhone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(OtherPhone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Outro Telefone (exibição)
